headline: Costco Posts Stronger Sales Growth in Fiscal Q2
summary: Retailer outpaces major peers as comparable sales and membership income rise.

headline: Trump tariffs: Customs and Border Protection tells judge it can't comply with refund order
summary: CBP told Court of International Trade Judge Richard Eaton that the total amount of IEEPA tariffs duties collected since last year is about $166 billion.

headline: Best Buy Co Inc (NYSE:BBY) Offers a High Yield and Strong Fundamentals for Dividend Investors
summary: Best Buy offers a high 5.7% dividend yield with a strong history of increases, backed by solid earnings power and cash flow for reliable passive income.

headline: DA Davidson Reduces Best Buy (BBY) Price Target Following Earnings Review
summary: Best Buy Co., Inc. (NYSE:BBY) is included among the 15 Best High Dividend Stocks to Invest in Under $100. On March 4, Michael Baker of DA Davidson lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Best Buy Co., Inc. (NYSE:BBY) to $78 from $85. The analyst maintained a Buy rating on the shares. Baker said the firm […]
